prestazioni: 4G63T (7th-gen CT9A chassis) forced-induction upgrade with a Garrett GT35R turbo (82mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a Tomei 272°/272° camshaft set, HKS 264T-11 high-flow fuel pump, and a custom-tuned AEM Infinity 7 ECU with flex-fuel ethanol mapping for 350whp on 98 RON + E85 blend

Full billet aluminum shortblock reinforcement via a Darton MID sleeves kit (87mm bore) with forged CP 87mm pistons (8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-S 2.0L stroker crankshaft (88mm stroke) for 2.2L displacement, mated to a TODA Racing 1.5mm head gasket and ARP L19 head studs

HKS Hi-Power RS 70mm titanium exhaust system with 3.5" piping, custom 50mm wastegate dump tubes, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 2.2 bar peak pressure management, paired with a Mishimoto X-Line front-mount intercooler (600hp core) and a custom 3" silicone intake piping kit from Vibrant Performance
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody conversion kit (CT9A-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap, and a custom front splitter with integrated canards from Vertex Lang

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CT9A-specific valving) with 24mm front/22mm rear adjustable sway bars from Ultra Racing, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +15 ET) and Toyo R888R tires (255/40/18)

Custom carbon fiber rear diffuser from Seibon with integrated dual 3.5" exhaust exits, a Cusco Type RS rear strut tower bar, and a custom carbon fiber hood with a 3" ram-air scoop and NACA ducts for intercooler cooling
